name: Sustainability & Green Building Intake
description: Green building and sustainability certification intake for construction and renovation projects. Evaluates a project's sustainability goals, certification target, energy performance strategy, material and resource commitments, and team readiness to produce a sustainability profile with gap analysis, certification pathway, and recommended pre-design actions.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Sustainability Project Profile
types.description: Generated sustainability project profile from intake session data.
